vehicle_fixed_cost.label: Optional fixed cost charged per dispatched vehicle/route (default: 0). [optional]

start_time.label: Route start time in model time units (default: 0). [optional]

travel_speed.label: Travel speed in coordinate-units per time unit (default: 1). [optional]

enforce_time_windows.label: When true, only stops with lateness <= allowed_lateness are eligible for assignment (default: false)...
enforce_time_windows.tooltip: When true, only stops with lateness <= allowed_lateness are eligible for assignment (default: false).

depot_close_time.label: Optional hard close time by which each route must return to depot. [optional]

break_start_time.label: Optional global break-window start time for all vehicles. [optional]

break_end_time.label: Optional global break-window end time for all vehicles. [optional]

break_duration.label: Optional global break duration applied once per route when break window is intersected. [optional]

use_priority_scoring.label: Use Priority Scoring [optional]
use_priority_scoring.tooltip: When true, ranks feasible candidates by projected lateness/slack before travel distance; when false, uses nearest-neighbour baseline (default: true).

max_vehicles.label: Optional maximum number of vehicles/routes to construct. [optional]

max_route_distance.label: Optional maximum route travel distance, including return to depot. [optional]

max_route_time.label: Optional maximum route duration in model time units, including return to depot. [optional]

max_stops_per_vehicle.label: Optional maximum number of stops assigned to each vehicle route. [optional]

objective_mode.label: Route-construction objective: minimize_lateness, minimize_distance, minimize_vehicles, or minimize_cost...
objective_mode.tooltip: Route-construction objective: minimize_lateness, minimize_distance, minimize_vehicles, or minimize_cost.

assignment_output.label: Optional stop assignment point output with time-window diagnostics. [optional]

input.label: Input raster path or typed raster object. (default input.tif).

radius.label: Wiener local window radius in pixels (default 2). [optional]

optical_bundle.label: Multispectral raster with red and NIR (and optionally SWIR) bands. (default optical_scene.tif).

swir_band_index.label: SWIR Band Index [optional]
swir_band_index.tooltip: Band index (0-based) for SWIR band (optional; enables NDMI).

biomass_proxy.label: Optional LiDAR-derived canopy height or biomass proxy raster. [optional]

fuel_model.label: Fuel model for regional calibration: temperate_mixed_forest, boreal_sparse, mediterranean_shrub...
fuel_model.tooltip: Fuel model for regional calibration: temperate_mixed_forest, boreal_sparse, mediterranean_shrub, tropical_dense, grassland_savanna, none.

profile.label: Risk sensitivity profile: conservative, balanced, aggressive. (default balanced). [optional]
profile.tooltip: Risk sensitivity profile: conservative, balanced, aggressive.

zone_block_cells.label: Block aggregation size for risk zone polygons. (default 20). [optional]

output_prefix.label: Output prefix for generated artifacts. (default wildfire_risk). [optional]

settlements_epsg.label: Optional EPSG for settlements when source CRS metadata is missing (required for CSV). (default 4326)...

transmission_region.label: Transmission grid context: dense_grid, sparse_grid, remote. (default dense_grid). [optional]
transmission_region.tooltip: Transmission grid context: dense_grid, sparse_grid, remote.

profile.label: Scoring profile: fast, balanced, quality. (default balanced). [optional]

input.label: Input yield point vector path. (default yield_points.gpkg).

output_prefix.label: Output prefix for all generated artifacts. (default yield_pipeline). [optional]

use_field_aliases.label: Use Field Aliases [optional]
use_field_aliases.tooltip: If true, auto-resolve common field aliases when configured fields are missing (default true).

moisture_field_name.label: Optional grain moisture field name for dry-yield normalization (e.g., MOISTURE). [optional]

target_moisture_pct.label: Target moisture percent for dry-yield normalization when moisture_field_name is supplied. (default 15.5)...

speed_field_name.label: Optional speed field (km/h) for telemetry QA filtering. [optional]

heading_field_name.label: Optional heading field (degrees) for telemetry QA filtering. [optional]

min_speed_kmh.label: Minimum accepted speed in km/h when speed_field_name is supplied. (default 1.0). [optional]

max_speed_kmh.label: Maximum accepted speed in km/h when speed_field_name is supplied. (default 18.0). [optional]

max_heading_change_deg.label: Maximum allowed local heading jump in degrees when heading_field_name is supplied. (default 35.0). [optional]

header_field_name.label: Header/region field name used for reconciliation (default HEADER). [optional]

profile.label: Pipeline profile: fast, balanced, strict. (default balanced). [optional]

edge_radius.label: Neighborhood radius for edge detection (profile default). [optional]

reconcile_radius.label: Neighborhood radius for multi-header reconciliation (profile default). [optional]

normalization_radius.label: Neighborhood radius for local normalization (default depends on profile). [optional]

lag_correction_mode.label: Optional lag correction mode for pass points: none or distance. (default none). [optional]
lag_correction_mode.tooltip: Optional lag correction mode for pass points: none or distance.

lag_distance_m.label: Distance lag in map units for lag_correction_mode=distance. (default 0.0). [optional]

filtering_mode.label: Filtering mode after pass-aware smoothing: standard or robust. (default standard). [optional]
filtering_mode.tooltip: Filtering mode after pass-aware smoothing: standard or robust.

robust_mad_threshold.label: MAD threshold for robust filtering mode (default depends on profile). [optional]

z_score_threshold.label: Outlier z-score threshold for yield filtering (profile default). [optional]

mean_tonnage.label: Optional target mean yield after reconciliation. [optional]

standardize.label: Standardize [optional]
standardize.tooltip: If true, output standardized values instead of [0,1] normalization.

ignore_zeros.label: Ignore zero-yield points during pass reconstruction. (default False). [optional]

max_change_in_heading.label: Maximum heading change in degrees for pass logic (default 25). [optional]
